description: §19.7.3 wildcard escape — a `!{}` handler with a `_` wildcard arm covering the remaining unmatched variants IS exhaustive; E-TYPE-080 does NOT fire. Only .NotFound is named; `_` absorbs .Timeout.
rationale: §19.7.3: a `_` wildcard arm SHALL satisfy exhaustiveness for remaining unmatched variants (per §18.6). So a handler with `.NotFound` + `_` is exhaustive -> no E-TYPE-080.
